You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. description: Elevate your driving experience with this remarkable 2023 Chevrolet Suburban Premier. This full-size SUV is a true testament to Chevrolet's commitment to quality and innovation, offering a commanding presence on the road and a wealth of premium features that will captivate discerning drivers.  - BACK UP CAMERA - CLEAN CARFAX - CERTIFIED - LEATHER - ONE OWNER - NAVIGATION SYSTEM - APPLE CAR PLAY - POWER SEATS - BLUETOOTH - XM RADIO - POWER LIFTGATE - WELL MAINTAINED - PREMIUM PACKAGE - HEATED SEATS - Lifetime Oil Changes  Boasting the powerful EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine paired with a smooth-shifting 10-Speed Automatic transmission, this Suburban Premier delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, with an impressive 4WD capability that will conquer any terrain. Indulge in the luxurious comfort of the leather-appointed seating, where heated and ventilated front seats and a heated steering wheel ensure a truly relaxing driving experience, no matter the weather.  The advanced Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Premium system with a large, intuitive touchscreen display puts a world of connectivity at your fingertips. Enjoy seamless integration with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, as well as the premium Bose 10-speaker surround sound system that will elevate your music listening experience. The Navigation System and SiriusXM Radio with 360L provide endless entertainment and convenience, while the Hands-Free Rear Power Programmable Liftgate and Remote Start add an extra layer of ease to your daily routine.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and this Suburban Premier is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. From the Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert to the Rear Cross Traffic Alert and Safety Alert Seat, you can navigate the roads with confidence, knowing that your vehicle is looking out for you.  With its spacious and versatile interior, the Suburban Premier offers ample room for passengers and cargo, making it the perfect companion for family adventures, road trips, and everything in between. The power-folding 3rd-row seats and the available power-release 2nd-row bucket seats provide unparalleled flexibility, ensuring that you can easily adapt to your changing needs.  Experience the epitome of refined capability and luxury in this 2023 Chevrolet Suburban Premier. description: The 2018 Jeep Compass Latitude offers a versatile and capable SUV experience with a stylish Granite Crystal Metallic Clearcoat exterior and a sleek black interior. With just over 61,000 miles, this used Jeep combines reliability with modern features, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking both comfort and utility. Its 2.4-liter four-cylinder engine delivers 180 horsepower, paired with a smooth 9-speed automatic transmission and 4WD drivetrain, ensuring confident handling across various terrains. Fuel efficiency is competitive, offering 22 mpg in city driving and up to 30 mpg on the highway, making it a practical option for daily commuting and weekend adventures. Inside, you'll find a well-equipped cabin with heated seats, keyless entry, push button start, and navigation, providing convenience and connectivity. The vehicle also features Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, satellite radio readiness, a backup camera, and a touchscreen display, ensuring entertainment and seamless smartphone integration.Designed with safety and security in mind, the 2018 Jeep Compass Latitude is equipped with essential features to protect occupants. Drivers knee airbags and active head restraints for front passengers help mitigate injury risks. The vehicles 4-wheel ABS, electronic parking brake, and brake drying enhance braking performance in various conditions. Auto-locking power door locks add security when parked, providing peace of mind for owners. With these safety features, the Compass emphasizes driver confidence and occupant protection in every drive.2018 Jeep Compass Safety and Security FeaturesThis model includes critical safety features such as knee airbags for the driver and active head restraints for dual front passengers, helping reduce injury risks. The 4-wheel ABS ensures stable braking, while the electronic parking brake simplifies parking maneuvers. Brake drying improves braking performance in wet conditions, and auto-locking power door locks enhance security when the vehicle is parked.2018 Jeep Compass Entertainment and Technology FeaturesEntertainment and connectivity are well-covered with a voice-operated radio and a touchscreen display, offering intuitive control over media and navigation. The vehicle features six speakers for clear sound, along with auxiliary audio inputs via USB and iPod/iPhone, ensuring versatile listening options. Electronic messaging assistance, both read and voice-operated, keeps drivers connected safely on the go.2018 Jeep Compass Performance FeaturesPerformance-wise, the Compass Latitude features an electronic 4WD selector that allows drivers to switch between drive modes as needed. A locking differential at the rear enhances traction in challenging conditions. The vehicles on-demand 4WD system provides a balance of efficiency and capability, making it suitable for a variety of driving environments.Recent Arrival! Clean CARFAX. description: Discover the perfect blend of power, capability, and style with this 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT LT2. This exceptional truck is ready to take on any challenge, whether you're hauling heavy loads, navigating off-road terrain, or simply enjoying the open road.  - Actual MPG rating will vary with options, driving conditions, habits and vehicle condition. - 5.3L V8 EcoTec3 engine with Active Fuel Management and Variable Valve Timing, delivering 355 hp and 383 lb-ft of torque - All Star Edition with features like driver 10-way power seat adjuster, dual-zone climate control, Remote Vehicle Starter system, and more - Spray-on bed liner with bowtie logo, providing a durable and water-tight seal for your cargo  This Silverado is equipped with an impressive array of features that make it a true workhorse and a pleasure to drive. The 4-wheel drive system provides confident handling in all conditions, while the 6-speed automatic transmission with overdrive ensures smooth, efficient power delivery. The exterior boasts a bold, muscular design with a chrome grille, body-color bumpers, and 18-inch bright machined aluminum wheels, giving the Silverado a commanding presence on the road.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior, featuring cloth seating, a 40/20/40 front split bench seat, and a 10-way power driver's seat for optimal comfort and support. The Chevrolet MyLink premium audio system with an 8-inch touchscreen display, SiriusXM satellite radio, and Bluetooth connectivity keeps you entertained and connected on the go.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like dual-stage frontal airbags, side-impact airbags, and electronic stability control to help keep you and your passengers secure. The Silverado also boasts an impressive array of driver-assist technologies, including rear-view camera, rear park assist, and forward collision alert, to help you navigate with confidence.  Whether you're looking for a capable work truck, a versatile family hauler, or a stylish and well-equipped daily driver, this 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT LT2 is sure to impress. Experience the power, technology, and comfort of this exceptional vehicle for yourself. Schedule a test drive today and let us show you why the Silverado is the perfect choice for your next adventure.  2 Year/200,000 mi. description: Experience the versatile 2018 Toyota RAV4 XLE Sport Utility, a dependable SUV that combines practicality with modern convenience. With a sleek white exterior and a comfortable black interior, this used vehicle offers a smooth ride powered by a 2.5-liter four-cylinder engine producing 176 horsepower. Equipped with an automatic 6-speed transmission and all-wheel drive, its ready to handle various terrains and weather conditions. This RAV4 features advanced safety and driver-assist technologies, including adaptive cruise control, lane keep assist, collision warning, and fog lights, making every journey safer and more relaxed. The spacious five-passenger cabin includes a sunroof or moonroof, Bluetooth connectivity, and a backup camera, ensuring you stay connected and confident behind the wheel. With 140,493 miles on the odometer, this SUV delivers reliable performance and comfort for daily commutes or weekend adventures.Designed to meet the needs of active drivers, this Toyota RAV4 balances power with fuel efficiency, achieving 22 mpg in the city and 28 mpg on the highway. Its four-door layout provides easy access for passengers, while the black interior adds a touch of refinement. The vehicles features extend to convenience and safety, making it an attractive choice for families or anyone seeking a durable, well-equipped SUV. Whether navigating city streets or exploring off the beaten path, this RAV4 offers a confident, comfortable ride with modern features that enhance every drive.2018 Toyota RAV4 Safety and Security FeaturesThis RAV4 prioritizes safety with key features such as knee airbags for the driver, four-wheel anti-lock braking system (ABS), and automatic-locking power door locks. These elements work together to protect occupants and enhance security during every trip, giving you peace of mind on the road.2018 Toyota RAV4 Entertainment and Technology FeaturesStay connected and entertained with the RAV4s advanced technology. It includes voice-operated hands-free phone call integration and a voice-operated radio, complemented by a 6.1-inch touchscreen infotainment display. The vehicle is equipped with six speakers, USB auxiliary audio input, and compatibility with iPod/iPhone devices, making it easy to enjoy your favorite music and stay linked on the go.2018 Toyota RAV4 Performance FeaturesUnder the hood, this SUV features on-demand four-wheel drive, providing enhanced traction and stability across varying road conditions. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. Elevate your driving experience with the 2023 Hyundai Sonata SEL. description: Why BUY from Tom Gill Chevrolet?    When you choose this Onyx Black Metallic 2023 Volvo XC60 Ultimate Bright Theme with 59,855 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!                         Tom Gill Advantages  ***Lifetime Oil Changes and Tire Rotations*** ***Home of the 48 Hour Money BACK Guarantee***   What this vehicle includes:    Climate Package ($750 value)Headlamp CleanersHeated Rear SeatsHeated Steering WheelProtection Package Premier ($760 value)Bumper CoverFirst Aid KitRubber Floor MatsCargo TrayWheel Locks        Safety and Security Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Oklahoma Citys local INFINITI dealer, Bob Moore INFINITI, is here for all your auto needs. We serve all the Oklahoma City metro including Oklahoma City, Edmond, Moore, Norman, and more. If youre looking for a local car dealership that offers new INFINITIs, used vehicles of all makes and models, exceptional service, and multiple finance options weve got you covered. Looking for used vehicles for sale in Oklahoma City? At Bob Moore INFINITI we have a large assortment of used vehicles including a variety of makes and models. While we carry many used makes and models, we also carry used INFINITIs in case you arent looking for new models. If youre still trying to decide which model and trim is the best fit, we can get you with one of our certified INFINITI specialists to go over all the details  whether its regarding features, warranties, service, financing, or any other areas youd like addressed. Our dealership also offers a variety of amenities, free Wi-Fi, and all kinds of perks. For those wishing to shop for their car online, we can help you with that as well. All our inventory is held on our website where you can complete the whole purchase process. If youd like to visit the dealership but need assistance getting there, we offer free valet service within 30 minutes of our store and give free at-home delivery. If you need to schedule any of these services, please call our dealership. When buying an used vehicle, we want to make sure you get your moneys worth. To ensure this, we put all our used vehicles through a service reconditioning process. This process includes a 106-point inspection of the vehicle to ensure that its up to our standards. We make sure the tires have three 30-second tire depths or 30%, if they dont, well replace the tires. Well also replace any brakes over 3mm. After the vehicles full inspection, it leaves the shop and goes through cosmetic refurbishing where we inspect and replace scratches, dents, scuffs, and road rash, as well as interior leather and upholstery reconditioning. While we work hard to ensure the quality of all used vehicles, we must acknowledge that some will end up with defects. Speak with one of our sales specialists about an used vehicle youre interested in to get a history of the car. Bob Moore also covers all your INFINITI, and any other make or model, service needs with our factory trained technicians, including 4 master certified technicians. This includes a complimentary car wash and vacuum with every service. Prior to your service, contact our dealership team to get your service appointment set up. Financing a vehicle purchase can be a stressful process but Bob Moore INFINITI offers a seamless auto financing, with over 20 lenders to work with. This helps us ensure that were getting you the best deal possible for your new car. If you have any questions when going through the financing, dont stress. Well have our INFINITI finance expert there with you to answer any questions or concerns you might have. Do you need to trade in your current vehicle? We buy cars too. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: The 2023 Honda Passport EX-L is a midsize sport-utility vehicle designed for families and active lifestyles. It combines rugged capability with everyday comfort and modern technology, making it equally suited for highway cruising, daily errands, and weekend adventures.  Performance & Capability  Engine: Powered by a 3.5-liter V6 engine, the Passport EX-L delivers strong and smooth acceleration for merging, passing, and towing.  Horsepower & Torque: The V6 produces robust output that helps the vehicle feel confident on hills and highways.  Transmission: A responsive 9-speed automatic transmission contributes to smooth shifts and efficient performance.  Drivetrain: Front-wheel drive is standard, with available all-wheel drive for better traction in rain, snow, or light off-road conditions.  Towing: The Passport EX-L is capable of towing moderate trailers or recreational gear, making it a practical choice for outdoor activities.  Interior & Comfort  Seating: The EX-L trim seats up to five passengers comfortably, with ample headroom and legroom for adults in both rows.  Materials: Leather-trimmed seats and upgraded interior finishes deliver a more premium feel than lower trims.  Cargo Space: The Passport offers a generous cargo area behind the rear seats, and the rear seats fold flat to expand cargo capacity for larger loads.  Technology & Convenience  Infotainment: A user-friendly touchscreen system provides access to media, navigation, and vehicle settings.  Connectivity: Standard smartphone integration enables easy connection for music, calls, and apps.  Comfort Features: Heated front seats, power-adjustable drivers seat, dual-zone automatic climate control, and a power tailgate enhance daily comfort and convenience.  Safety & Driver Assistance  The Passport EX-L includes a suite of standard safety and driver-assist technologies designed to help protect occupants and support confident driving. These features typically include collision mitigation, lane-keeping assist, adaptive cruise control, and blind-spot monitoring.  Exterior Design  The exterior styling blends ruggedness with modern SUV proportions. description: The 2023 Chevrolet Colorado Work Truck is a midsize pickup engineered for durability, practicality, and everyday job-site reliability. Designed with a focus on function over flash, the Work Truck trim delivers the essential capability needed for work and daily driving at an accessible price point.  Performance & Capability  Power comes from a 2.7-liter turbocharged four-cylinder engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, delivering responsive acceleration and dependable performance. The Colorado Work Truck offers strong torque for hauling and towing, making it well-suited for trailers, equipment, and job-site demands. Available rear-wheel drive or four-wheel drive configurations allow the truck to adapt to different driving conditions and terrains.  Interior & Comfort  Inside, the cabin is straightforward and functional, built with durable materials designed to handle daily wear and tear. The crew cab configuration provides seating for up to five passengers, offering ample room for coworkers or family while maintaining a practical layout. Controls are simple and intuitive, keeping the focus on ease of use.  Technology & Features  The Colorado Work Truck includes modern technology essentials such as a touchscreen infotainment system with smartphone integration, a digital driver information display, and multiple USB ports. These features help keep drivers connected and informed without unnecessary complexity.  Safety  Standard safety features include automatic emergency braking, forward collision alert, lane keep assist, and a rearview camera. These systems enhance driver awareness and confidence, whether navigating busy streets or work environments.  Exterior & Utility  The exterior design is rugged and purposeful, featuring a strong front fascia, steel wheels, and a durable pickup bed designed for hauling tools, materials, and equipment. description: Looking for a dependable pickup that combines rugged performance with modern tech? This 2023 Nissan Frontier offers a compelling blend of capability and comfort, making it a smart choice for both work and weekend adventures. With a sturdy 3.8-liter V6 engine delivering 310 horsepower and 281 lb-ft of torque, this truck provides ample power while maintaining reasonable fuel economy of 17 mpg city and 22 mpg highway. Weighing approximately 1,132.5 pounds and equipped with a 4X4 drivetrain, its built to handle tough terrains and demanding jobs. Its Charcoal interior and Gun Metallic exterior give it a sleek, understated look that suits any environment. Despite its mileage of 142,882, this used Frontier remains a solid option for those seeking a reliable, well-equipped pickup with features like a backup camera, Bluetooth connectivity, collision warning, push start, and satellite radio readiness.This Nissan Frontier is packed with safety and entertainment features designed to keep drivers secure and connected. It includes essential safety systems such as a rear seat reminder, dual front knee airbags, and 4-wheel anti-lock braking system (ABS). The vehicle also offers auto-locking power door locks, anti-lockout functionality, and hill descent assist to enhance off-road confidence. Inside, you'll find modern technology like NissanConnect compatibility for smart device app integration, voice-operated hands-free calling, and a touchscreen radio interface. Electronic messaging assistance with read and voice functions, along with USB and iPod/iPhone auxiliary inputs, ensure you stay connected and entertained on every journey.2023 Nissan Frontier Safety and Security FeaturesThe Frontier comes equipped with a rear seat reminder to prevent accidental oversight, dual front knee airbags for added protection, and a 4-wheel anti-lock braking system to improve stability during sudden stops. Power door locks feature auto-locking and anti-lockout functions, enhancing security and convenience. For off-road driving, hill descent control helps maintain a steady speed on steep declines, making tough terrains safer to navigate.2023 Nissan Frontier Entertainment and Technology FeaturesThe vehicle offers NissanConnect compatibility, allowing seamless smartphone integration through a smart device app. Hands-free voice-operated phone calls and radio functions enable safer communication and entertainment while on the move. The touchscreen display provides easy access to audio and navigation features, complemented by electronic messaging assistance that reads messages aloud and can be operated by voice. For audio sources, it supports USB and iPod/iPhone auxiliary inputs, ensuring a variety of media options to suit your preferences.2023 Nissan Frontier Performance FeaturesThis Frontier features an electronic high-low 4WD selector, giving you control over traction and driveline engagement. The trucks 4WD system is part-time, allowing you to switch between 2WD and 4WD modes as needed, optimizing performance for both on-road comfort and off-road capability.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Safety Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-off cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control with lane change simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control with lane change.Technology and Telematics SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring     To be sure you don't miss out, give us a call at 207-922-2277 and schedule a test drive. description: The 2025 Chevrolet TrailBlazer LT is a versatile and capable SUV that's perfect for your active lifestyle. With its sleek gray exterior, powerful turbocharged engine, and advanced safety features, this TrailBlazer is sure to impress.  Key features include:  AWD  Alloy Wheels  Back-up Cam  Bluetooth  Cruise Control  Keyless Start  Lane Departure Warning  Lane Keeping Assist  Remote Start  And more!  Under the hood, you'll find a 1.3L I3 Turbocharged DOHC 12V engine that delivers an impressive 155 horsepower. Paired with a 9-speed automatic transmission, this powertrain provides a smooth and efficient driving experience, with an EPA-estimated 26 MPG in the city and 29 MPG on the highway.  Safety is a top priority in the TrailBlazer LT, which comes equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Features like Forward Collision Alert, Automatic Emergency Braking, and Lane Keep Assist help keep you and your passengers secure on the road.  The interior of the TrailBlazer LT is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind. Enjoy the convenience of keyless entry and push-button start, as well as the connectivity of wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The spacious cabin offers ample room for passengers and cargo, with a split-folding rear seat for added versatility.  Whether you're navigating the daily commute or embarking on a weekend adventure, the 2025 Chevrolet TrailBlazer LT is the perfect companion. With its impressive capabilities, advanced technology, and eye-catching style, this SUV is sure to exceed your expectations.  The Fazza Price shown includes a $1,000 trade-in assistance credit when you trade in an eligible vehicle (10 years old or newer with under 120,000 miles) and be in proper running condition at the time of the sale. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. description: This 2024 Ford F-150 XLT 4x4 in Atlas Blue Metallic has the 303A High Package, FX4 Off-Road package, and panoramic twin-panel moonroof delivers a blend of rugged capability and upscale comfort . It features a 12-inch infotainment screen, B O Sound System, heated seats, and advanced towing tech like Pro Trailer Backup Assist, all packaged with off-road tuned shocks, skid plates, and a massive moonroof. Key Features: Performance Drivetrain: Equipped with 4x4, Electronic Locking Differential, and the 3.5L Powerboost engine, producing 430 horsepower and 570 lb-ft of torque with a10-speed automatic transmission. Equipment Group 303A High: Upgrades the XLT with LED projector headlights, 12-inch productivity screen, 8-speaker B O sound system, 10-way power heated front seats, intelligent access with push-button start, and power-adjustable pedals. FX4 Off-Road Package: Includes specialized off-road tuned front shock absorbers, monotube rear shocks, skid plates for the fuel tank, transfer case, and front differential, and a Rock Crawl mode. Interior Comfort: Dual-panel moonroof provides an open-air feel. Includes dual-zone automatic climate control, a 12-inch touchscreen with SYNC 4, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, and a power-sliding rear window. Safety Towing: Equipped with Co-Pilot360 2.0 (Lane-Keeping System, Pre-Collision Assist, Rearview Camera) plus Ford BlueCruise capability. Tow/Haul package includes Pro Trailer Backup Assist and trailer hitch. This high-spec XLT offers, in many respects, the technology and convenience of a Lariat, while retaining its rugged off-road focus.

With only 18,452 miles and a proven V6 3.5L gasoline engine paired to all-wheel drive, this Nissan Pathfinder delivers confident performance, smooth highway cruising, and family-ready capability at the best price in the area. Inside, the Nissan Pathfinder offers versatile seating and cargo options for weekend adventures or daily commutes. The AWD system enhances traction in varying road conditions, and the efficient 3.5L V6 balances power with responsible fuel economy for its class. Whether you need family space, towing capability, or comfortable long-distance driving, this Nissan Pathfinder is a smart choice. description: The 2026 Ram 1500 Black Express Crew Cab 4x4 delivers bold styling, modern technology, and confident capability in a clean, aggressive package. Powered by the 3.0L Hurricane SO twin-turbo inline-six engine with Stop/Start technology and paired with a smooth 8-speed automatic transmission, this Ram 1500 provides strong performance, responsive acceleration, and refined driving manners both on the highway and off the pavement.  Equipped with a four-wheel-drive system and a 3.55 rear axle ratio, this Black Express is well suited for changing road conditions, light off-road use, and towing needs. Finished in Granite Crystal Metallic Clear-Coat, the exterior is elevated by the Black Express Edition, giving the truck a sport-focused appearance with blacked-out accents and distinctive styling details.  Inside the Crew Cab, the cabin is functional, comfortable, and thoughtfully designed. Cloth bucket seats provide supportive seating for daily driving, while the rear seat and in-floor storage bins add versatility for passengers and cargo. Technology is centered around the Uconnect 5 infotainment system with an 8.4-inch touchscreen, offering smartphone integration, hands-free connectivity, and intuitive access to vehicle settings.  A full suite of advanced safety and driver-assist technologies is integrated throughout, helping enhance confidence whether youre commuting, towing, or navigating busy roadways.  Key Performance & Technology Highlights  3.0L Hurricane SO twin-turbo inline-six engine with Stop/Start  8-speed automatic transmission  Four-wheel drive (4x4)  Uconnect 5 with 8.4-inch touchscreen display  Adaptive Cruise Control with Stop and Go  Blind Spot Monitoring with Rear Cross Path Detection  This Ram 1500 Black Express is equipped with Customer Preferred Package 21D, the Black Express Edition, and the Bed Utility Group, adding desirable features such as 20-inch aluminum wheels, sport performance hood, anti-spin rear differential, Black tubular side steps by Mopar, spray-in bedliner, deployable bed step, LED pickup box lighting, 400-watt inverter, rear power-sliding window, and exterior 115V AC outlet, enhancing both style and everyday usability. description: Discover the exceptional 2025 Nissan Versa 1.6 SV, a compact sedan that combines style, performance, and unparalleled value. With its sleek gray exterior and a well-appointed interior, this Versa is the perfect blend of modern design and practical functionality.  This Versa boasts an impressive array of features, including - CLEAN CARFAX, NISSAN CERTIFIED, ONE OWNER, BACK UP CAMERA, APPLE CARPLAY & ANDROID AUTO, CARPETED FLOOR MATS & TRUNK MAT (5-PIECE SET), SPLASH GUARDS, and TRUNK PACKAGE with Trunk Net and Shopping Bag Hooks.  Under the hood, the Versa is powered by a 1.6L I4 DOHC 16V engine, delivering an exceptional 32 MPG in the city and 40 MPG on the highway. With its Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT) and Front-Wheel Drive (FWD) configuration, this sedan offers a smooth and efficient driving experience.  As a Nissan Certified pre-owned vehicle, this Versa has undergone a thorough inspection and comes with the assurance of a comprehensive warranty, giving you peace of mind and confidence in your purchase. With only 14 miles on the odometer, this Versa is practically brand new, offering you the opportunity to enjoy the latest technology and features at a fraction of the cost of a new model.  The 2025 Nissan Versa 1.6 SV is equipped with a wealth of advanced safety features, including ABS brakes, dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, a knee airbag, and an occupant sensing airbag. Additionally, it boasts cutting-edge technology such as Blind Spot Warning, Rear Parking Sensors, and Auto High-beam Headlights, ensuring your driving experience is both safe and convenient.  Comfort and convenience are also priorities in this Versa, with amenities such as Air Conditioning, Rear Window Defroster, Power Windows, Remote Keyless Entry, Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls, and a Tilt and Telescoping Steering Wheel. The interior also features Upgraded Cloth Seat Trim, a Front Center Armrest, and a Split Folding Rear Seat, providing ample space and versatility.  This exceptional 2025 Nissan Versa 1.6 SV is a must-see for anyone seeking a reliable, feature-rich, and affordable compact sedan. Experience the difference for yourself and schedule a test drive today. description: Introducing the 2013 Toyota Prius v Three  the perfect blend of efficiency, versatility, and comfort for those who appreciate the finer things in life while being environmentally conscious. This remarkable vehicle is powered by a robust 1.8L Hybrid I4 engine, delivering a spirited 134 horsepower that seamlessly combines power with outstanding fuel efficiency. With an impressive average of 44 MPG in the city and 40 MPG on the highway, you can enjoy longer trips with fewer stops at the pump, making this Prius v a smart choice for both daily commuting and weekend getaways.  The exterior of this Prius v is finished in a sleek Classic Silver Metallic, providing a timeless and sophisticated look that stands out on the road. Its aerodynamic design not only enhances its aesthetic appeal but also contributes to its impressive fuel economy. The sporty silhouette is complemented by bold lines and a stylish front grille, making the Prius v a head-turner wherever you go.  Step inside, and you'll find a spacious and inviting interior that prioritizes comfort and functionality. The Misty Gray cloth upholstery offers a soft touch and a modern feel, ensuring that every ride is both cozy and stylish. With ample headroom and legroom for both front and rear passengers, this vehicle is designed to accommodate families and friends alike. The rear seats can be easily folded down, expanding the cargo space to handle anything from groceries to outdoor gear, making it an ideal choice for active lifestyles.  One of the standout features of the Prius v Three is its impressive array of factory-default technologies. The vehicle is equipped with a 6.1-inch touchscreen display that serves as the hub for the Entune Audio system. This intuitive interface allows you to easily access your favorite music, podcasts, and navigation options with just a few taps. The system includes Bluetooth connectivity, enabling hands-free calling and audio streaming, so you can stay connected while keeping your focus on the road.  For those who appreciate a touch of luxury, the Prius v Three also comes with a variety of convenience features. The automatic climate control system ensures that you and your passengers remain comfortable no matter the weather outside. Keyless entry and ignition make getting in and out of the vehicle a breeze, while the premium sound system provides crystal-clear audio for your listening pleasure.  Safety is a top priority in the 2013 Toyota Prius v, and it shows through a comprehensive suite of safety features. The vehicle is equipped with a robust array of airbags, antilock brakes, electronic stability control, and traction control, all designed to keep you and your loved ones safe on the road. Additionally, the rearview camera provides added peace of mind when reversing, making parking and maneuvering in tight spaces much easier.  This particular Prius v Three has had only one owner and boasts a clean CARFAX report, reflecting its well-maintained history and commitment to quality. With less than 130,000 miles on the odometer and an average of fewer than 10,000 miles per year, this vehicle is in excellent overall condition, ready to provide reliable service for many more miles to come.  In summary, the 2013 Toyota Prius v Three is more than just a vehicle; it's a lifestyle choice that emphasizes efficiency, comfort, and safety. With its striking Classic Silver Metallic exterior, spacious Misty Gray interior, impressive fuel economy, and array of features, this Prius v is perfect for those who seek a reliable and versatile vehicle that doesnt compromise on style or performance. Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or embarking on a family road trip, this Prius v will surely meet your needs and exceed your expectations. Dont miss your chance to own this exceptional vehicle  its ready to hit the road and create new memories with you![!@@Additional Info@@!]Air filtration, Front air conditioning: automatic climate description: Vehicle Details: 2016 Subaru Impreza Limited:    The 2016 Subaru Impreza Limited offers a perfect combination of reliability, comfort, and all-weather capability, making it a standout choice for drivers seeking a compact car with premium features. Powered by a fuel-efficient 2.0L 4-cylinder engine paired with a smooth 6-speed CVT, this Impreza delivers a balanced driving experience with 148 horsepower. Its signature AWD system ensures excellent traction and control, whether you're tackling snowy roads or winding mountain highways.    Step inside the Impreza Limited, and you'll find a refined interior designed with your comfort in mind. The leather-trimmed seats, heated front seats, and a leather-wrapped steering wheel provide a touch of luxury, while the spacious cabin comfortably accommodates up to five passengers. The intuitive dashboard layout includes a 7-inch touchscreen infotainment system featuring Subarus STARLINK, Bluetooth, USB ports, and compatibility with both Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, keeping you connected on the go.    Safety is a top priority in the Impreza Limited, which comes equipped with advanced features such as a rearview camera, Subaru's EyeSight Driver Assist Technology, and available options like adaptive cruise control, lane departure warning, and pre-collision braking. These systems provide an added layer of confidence for every journey.    On the outside, the 2016 Impreza boasts sleek styling with a bold grille, LED headlights, and 17-inch alloy wheels that enhance its modern appearance. Its compact size makes it easy to maneuver in tight city spaces while still offering a roomy interior and a versatile trunk for your gear or groceries.    If youre searching for a reliable, feature-packed compact car that doesnt compromise on performance or comfort, the 2016 Subaru Impreza Limited is an excellent choice.    Visit Snyder Motors Inc. in Bozeman, Montana, today to take this impressive Subaru for a test drive!  Equipment: This unit keeps you comfortable with Auto Climate. description: 2016 Porsche Macan S  Beautiful Macan!  Overview and Performance This 2016 Porsche Macan S is powered by the potent 3.0L Twin-Turbo V6 delivering 340 horsepower and 339 ft-lbs of torque. The engine is mated to Porsches quick-shifting 7-speed PDK dual-clutch automatic transmission and a permanent all-wheel-drive system, providing confident acceleration, refined power delivery and exceptional traction in varied driving conditions. The Macan S blends sports-car performance with SUV practicality: brisk 060 times, strong mid-range torque, and poised handling courtesy of a well-tuned chassis, precisely weighted steering, and a sophisticated suspension setup. Braking performance is secure and progressive, supported by ventilated disc brakes and electronic stability-management systems.  Exterior and Styling The Macans exterior presents Porsches unmistakable design language scaled into a compact luxury crossover: a broad, athletic stance, sculpted bodywork, and functional aerodynamic elements. Factory paint and body finish are in excellent condition, with tight panel gaps and a clean, glossy finish. Standard exterior elements for the Macan S typically include LED daytime running lights, fog lights, power-folding heated mirrors, and a power-operated tailgate. The vehicle rides on factory alloy wheels that complement the vehicles sporty posture; tire condition and tread depth are in very good shape consistent with the reported mileage.  Interior, Comfort and Convenience The Macan S cabin offers a driver-focused environment with high-quality materials and precise fit and finish. Factory-appointed features generally include leather or high-grade partial-leather upholstery, power-adjustable front seats with lumbar support, a heated steering wheel (depending on market and package), dual-zone automatic climate control, and comprehensive driver information displays. The center console houses Porsche Communication Management (PCM), which integrates infotainment, audio, and vehicle settings. PCM typically features a central touchscreen, AM/FM/HD radio, Bluetooth hands-free phone connectivity and audio streaming, voice control functionality, and auxiliary/USB inputs. Cruise control, multi-function steering wheel with paddle shifters, and power windows and locks are part of the standard convenience set.  Safety and Driver Assistance Safety systems on the 2016 Macan S include multiple airbags (front, side, curtain), anti-lock braking system (ABS), traction control, Porsche Stability Management (PSM), and tire pressure monitoring. Rear parking sensors, a backup camera and front assist systems may be factory-installed depending on the original specification and packages. The vehicle also includes LATCH/ISOFIX points for child seats. These systems combine to deliver a secure and confidence-inspiring driving experience.  Chassis, Driving Dynamics and Options The Macan S features a multi-link suspension with a balance of comfort and sport-oriented responsiveness. Electronic aids such as optional adaptive damping, air suspension, and the Sport Chrono package enhance dynamic performance for those desiring sharper throttle response, more aggressive shift mapping and additional driving modes. Factory performance-oriented features typically include sport-tuned suspension, electronic limited slip differentials or torque-vectoring (depending on original equipment), and dynamic transmission control for fast, crisp gear changes under load.  Practicality and Cargo Despite its athletic demeanor, the Macan S remains practical for daily use. The rear seats offer comfortable accommodation for passengers and fold flat to expand cargo area capacity. The rear hatch opens to a useful cargo floor and tie-down points; roof rails may be present for additional transport flexibility.
